title: Confined Space Entry - Atmospheric Testing
requirement: Before any personnel enter a confined space, atmospheric testing MUST be conducted for oxygen content (must be between 19.5% and 23.5% by volume), flammable gases (< 1% LEL), and toxic gases (H2S < 10 ppm, CO < 35 ppm). Results must be recorded on the entry permit.

title: Standby Person / Hole Watch
requirement: A dedicated, trained standby person (hole watch) must remain outside the confined space entrance at all times while personnel are inside, equipped with reliable emergency communication.
